name: Iso11783IL_TIMGetProperty
title: Iso11783IL_TIMGetProperty
syntax: long Iso11783IL_TIMGetProperty(dbNode participant, char propertyName[]); // form 2
description: Gets a property of the TIM server/client.

parameters.name: isServerMaster
parameters.description: 1: TIM server is TIM server master. 0: TIM server is no TIM server master.

parameters.name: bootTime
parameters.description: Boot time which is reported in the TIM_ServerVersionResponse message.

parameters.name: minimumVersion
parameters.description: Minimum TIM version number of the TIM client/server.

parameters.name: implementedVersion
parameters.description: Implemented TIM version number of the TIM client/server.

parameters.name: deactivateCertificateValidation
parameters.description: Bit 0 = 1: Validation of Conformance Certification information against device certificate is deactivated. The parameter group ‘ISOBUS Compliance Certification’ is not requested. Bit 1 = 1: Validation of ISOBUS device name (NAME) against device certificate is deactivated. Bit 2 = 1: Validation of function capabilities against the certificates is deactivated. Bit 3 = 1: Check for revoked certificates is deactivated. Bit 4 = 1: Check for certificate type (client or server certificate) is deactivated.

parameters.name: enableDemoMode
parameters.description: 1: Demo mode is enabled. Therefore no certificates and keys are validated. 0: Demo mode is disabled.

parameters.name: useRequestCounter
parameters.description: 1: Increment request counter (starting with 0) in function request messages. 0: Request counter is not used when function request messages are sent.

parameters.name: restartAfterWorkflowViolation
parameters.description: 1: Client restarts communication to the server if there is a workflow violation. 0: Client does not restart communication to the server if there is a workflow violation.

parameters.name: requireAcknowledgeOfStartOfMotion
parameters.description: 1: Operator acknowledgement (Iso11783IL_TIMOperatorAcknowledgeStartOfMotion) is necessary to start vehicle motion by the client. 0: Client can start vehicle motion without operator acknowledgement.

parameters.name: participant
parameters.description: TIM participant (TIM server or TIM client).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
